drl:
rule "R0"
agenda-group "gb"
when
    $p0_0 : T0(f1 != true)
    T1($b0_1_0 : f0)
then
    insert(new T2(11, 5, "alpha", $p0_0.isF1()));
    insert(new T2(7, $b0_1_0, "b", true));
end
rule "R1"
salience -8
when
    T2(f0 == 12, f2 matches "[ab]", $b1_0_0 : f2)
    not T0(f1 != true)
    accumulate( T0(f0 in (-1000000007, 10), f0 == -3); $a1_2 : count() )
then
end
rule "R2"
salience($b2_1_0 - $b2_1_0)
when
    T0(f1 != true)
    T1($b2_1_0 : f0)
    T2(f1 < 6.0, f0 >= 7, $b2_2_0 : f2)
then
end
rule "R3"
when
    T2(f0 >= -2, $b3_0_0 : f3, $b3_0_1 : f1)
then
    drools.setFocus("gb");
end
query Q0(long $qa0_0, long $qa0_1, long $qa0_2)
    $qp0_0 : T1(f0 == $qa0_0, f0 == $qa0_1, f0 >= 5, f0 >= 1, $qb0_0 : f0, $qb0_1 : f0)
    $qp0_1 : T1(f0 != 5, f0 >= $qb0_1, $qb0_2 : f0)
    $qp0_2 : T0(f0 == $qa0_2, f0 == $qb0_0, f0 != $qb0_0, $qb0_3 : f0)
end

query Q1(long $qa1_0, long $qa1_1)
    $qp1_0 : T0(f0 == $qa1_0, f0 == $qa1_1, $qb1_0 : f0)
    $qp1_1 : T0(f0 != 100, f0 <= $qb1_0, f0 == $qb1_0, $qb1_1 : f0, $qb1_2 : f0)
end

query TCr(long $a, long $b)
    ( RelR($a, $b;) )
    or
    ( RelR($m, $b;) and TCr($a, $m;) )
end
